name: Glorified Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat the olive oil in hot oil. Brown half the pork chops for 10 minutes, or until browned. Repeat with the remaining chops. Remove and spoon off any excess fat.
2. In the same skillet, combine the soup and water. Bring to a boil. Return the pork chops to the skillet. Cover and cook over low heat for 10 minutes, or until the chops are no longer pink and have cooked through. Serve over rice.
